requirements.title: Allow users to pay for subscriptions using Bitcoin.
requirements.source_excerpt: Allow users to pay for subscriptions using Bitcoin.
requirements.reasoning: No codebase references to Bitcoin payments or subscription processing hooks found.
requirements.recommended_action: Implement the subscription payment processing handler.

requirements.title: User can connect their Coinbase wallet.
requirements.group: Feature Spec: Bitcoin Payments / 2. Acceptance Criteria
requirements.source_excerpt: User can connect their Coinbase wallet.
requirements.reasoning: Coinbase wallet SDK import and client connection components are absent.
requirements.recommended_action: Integrate Coinbase SDK and implement client-side wallet connector.

requirements.title: The system must process transaction receipts within 5 seconds.
requirements.group: Feature Spec: Bitcoin Payments / 2. Acceptance Criteria
requirements.source_excerpt: The system must process transaction receipts within 5 seconds.
requirements.reasoning: No transaction processing loops, background worker jobs, or callbacks found.
requirements.recommended_action: Configure background queues and define transaction confirmation handlers.
